topics.name: Frontend Architecture and Platform Design
topics.description: Real-world frontend systems, platform trade-offs, component patterns, browser extensions, and application evolution.
topics.intro: Architecture decisions only matter once they survive product constraints, browser limits, and legacy code. This topic collects the articles where frontend design becomes delivery work.

topics.name: Testing Strategy and Delivery Confidence
topics.description: Outside-in testing, integration-first confidence, and practical ways to ship faster without gambling on quality.
topics.intro: Testing is most useful when it helps teams release with confidence. These articles focus on outside in thinking, integration boundaries, and delivery choices that reduce risk.

topics.name: Web Performance, Reliability and Edge Security
topics.description: Incidents, performance tuning, edge architecture, and the reliability lessons hidden inside production failures.
topics.intro: Production systems fail in ways that local checks rarely reveal. This topic brings together incident analysis, performance tuning, security controls, and edge behaviour from real systems.

topics.name: Developer Experience and Engineering Effectiveness
topics.description: Tooling, workflow, code review decisions, metrics, and the systems that help engineers move faster with less friction.
topics.intro: Developer experience is about more than tool choice. These pieces look at workflow design, code review judgement, feedback loops, and the systems that shape day to day pace.

topics.name: Engineering Leadership, Mentoring and Career Growth
topics.description: Mentoring, engineering judgement, communication, and career lessons from real work and real mistakes.
topics.intro: Leadership is rarely abstract in day to day engineering. This topic covers mentoring, judgement, communication, and the career lessons that come from real projects and real mistakes.
